help.lines: The management group with the given name where the policy definition resides.

json.schema:
<prop type="array" name="roleDefinitionIds">
<prop type="array" name="allowedValues">
<prop type="array" name="versions">

<prop type="array" name="roleDefinitionIds">
<prop type="array" name="allowedValues">
<prop type="array" name="versions">

help.lines: The management group with the given name where the policy definition resides.

command.name: create

help.lines: The management group with the given name is where the policy definition will reside. It can be assigned only at scopes at or below this management group.

command.argGroup:
<arg type="array" var="$parameters.properties.externalEvaluationEnforcementSettings.roleDefinitionIds" options="role-definition-ids">
<arg type="array" var="$parameters.properties.parameters{}.allowedValues" options="allowed-values">
<arg type="array" var="$parameters.properties.versions" options="versions" hide="True" group="Properties">

json.schema:
<prop type="array" name="roleDefinitionIds" arg="$parameters.properties.externalEvaluationEnforcementSettings.roleDefinitionIds">
<prop type="array" name="allowedValues" arg="$parameters.properties.parameters{}.allowedValues">
<prop type="array" name="versions" arg="$parameters.properties.versions">

<prop type="array" name="roleDefinitionIds">
<prop type="array" name="allowedValues">
<prop type="array" name="versions">

<prop type="array" name="roleDefinitionIds" arg="$parameters.properties.externalEvaluationEnforcementSettings.roleDefinitionIds">
<prop type="array" name="allowedValues" arg="$parameters.properties.parameters{}.allowedValues">
<prop type="array" name="versions" arg="$parameters.properties.versions">

<prop type="array" name="roleDefinitionIds">
<prop type="array" name="allowedValues">
<prop type="array" name="versions">

command.name: update

help.lines: The management group with the given name where the policy definition resides.

command.argGroup:
<arg nullable="True" type="array" var="$parameters.properties.externalEvaluationEnforcementSettings.roleDefinitionIds" options="role-definition-ids">
<arg nullable="True" type="array" var="$parameters.properties.parameters{}.allowedValues" options="allowed-values">
<arg nullable="True" type="array" var="$parameters.properties.versions" options="versions" hide="True" group="Properties">

json.schema:
<prop type="array" name="roleDefinitionIds">
<prop type="array" name="allowedValues">
<prop type="array" name="versions">

<prop type="array" name="roleDefinitionIds" arg="$parameters.properties.externalEvaluationEnforcementSettings.roleDefinitionIds">
<prop type="array" name="allowedValues" arg="$parameters.properties.parameters{}.allowedValues">
<prop type="array" name="versions" arg="$parameters.properties.versions">
